title: sphaeralcea plicata
intro: Sphaeralcea plicata, also known as the pink gilia or pink gilia, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is known for its bright pink or purple flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea plicata include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile plant for natural remedies.
